sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8870" key="a)nqrwpobori/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθρωπο-βορία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n8870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cannibalism,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zeno Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.59</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
